Please use another fork website.
AdGuard decided to not handle these websites (pattern: `sbxh[0-9]+\.com`) because the website is one of fork websites about NewToki (pattern: `newtoki[0-9]+\.com`) and the websites have very lower traffic than NewToki.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.bing.com/search](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bing.com%2Fsearch) ### Comment > Filters for annoying elements cause the correct search results to not be displayed. > > For example, I wanted to download the program "renamer," but when I searched with AdGuard enabled, the official download page didn't appear in the search results. issue.title: www.windowscentral.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://direct.yandex.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdirect.yandex.ru%2F) ### Comment > Здравствуйте команда Adguard. > > Помогите, пожалуйста, с тем что при включенном ADGUARD - сайт яндекс директ - не загружается. > А если отключить ADGUARD, тогда сайт моментально загружается и продолжает работать далее если включить Adguard снова. > Я пробовал включать любые настройки - сработает, но только при первичном входе, а если перезагрузиться - не зайдёшь, пока не выключишь.Здравствуйте, команда Adguard. > > Помогите, пожалуйста, с тем, что при включённом Adguard сайт Яндекс Директ не загружается. > А если отключить Adguard, тогда сайт моментально загружается и продолжает работать, если включить Adguard снова. > Я пробовал включать любые настройки — срабатывает, но только при первичном входе, а если перезагрузиться — не зайдёшь, пока не выключишь Adguard. ### Screenshots

issue.title: Custom YouTube list

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Currently I use https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/youtube-auto-hd-+-fps/fcphghnknhkimeagdglkljinmpbagone to save my resolution and viewing preference e.g. 1080p60fps and theathre mode. 

### Proposed solution

It would be nice to not need an extra extension and use custom filter like some that easylist provides: https://github.com/easylist/easylist/tree/master/custom-lists.

### Additional information

_No response_
